ops.text:
E28 RESULTS — paid train complete, card verdict = WITHIN NOISE FLOOR (not actionable).

PAID RUN (SpendGuard cap $9, cleared): incumbent SFT recipe (WatcherRecipe.default, Qwen3-8B), --weight-mode example-weight, on the ready E28 dataset (E20 clean labels + E21 per-pair weights). 638 steps, batch 16, max_seq_len 4096, 5093 rendered SFT examples from the 6731-row pool. New sentinel AUC = 0.9189241505781672 (train_report.json / score_report.json). train_exit=0.

FREE PRE-FLIGHT (preflight_report.json): frame 628 rows, digest e85dc4a2ec94aae0 == incumbent probs meta digest, render 2; incumbent covers all 628, ids unique; my fire->AUC recompute reproduced the incumbent 0.9316896744944222 exactly (pairing logic verified). weight_sum 4019.0 (==E21 ESS), min 0.0909 max 1.0, 4214 deflated, 0 examples missing a weight. OverlongEvalRows PRE-CHECKED FREE (raised before any billable call): max token len 3878 < 4096 -> overlong_count 0, NO trimming needed.

PER-ROW PROBS PERSISTED: the pre-built bin/train.py returns only the scalar AUC and rmtree's the checkpoint (per-row fire discarded) — so a literal train.py run yields NO per-row probs and a paired DeLong is impossible without a second $9 run. Resolved in-bounds by running bin/train.py BYTE-FOR-BYTE via runpy (out/run_train_capture.py) with ONE transparent monkeypatch on promotion.sentinel_auc that records (labels, fire) then delegates and returns the real value unchanged — training/scoring path identical to the harness. Exactly 1 full-frame (len 628) sentinel_auc call was captured (observe_fit_score's final scoring; checkpoint selection uses athome.train.gate.sentinel_auc, unpatched). P(NO_STEER)=1-fire written via the sanctioned evalset.write_probs to out/probs/e28-example-weight.json (628 rows, digest+render stamped, coverage+[0,1] validated). Captured labels == frame.labels asserted.

PAIRED DeLong (out/delong_report.json), new (e28-example-weight) vs incumbent v002 on the identical 628-row frame; computed TWO independent ways (fast midrank + naive O(N^2) structural components) which agree to 1e-10 on AUCs and 1e-14 on covariance, both reproducing sentinel_auc exactly (no codex second-opinion available, so cross-checked internally):
- auc_incumbent 0.9316896744944222, auc_new 0.9189241505781672, delta -0.012765523916255184
- se_delta_paired 0.008474891744836933; measured rho 0.6984478492100372
- 95% paired CI [-0.029376006509011385, 0.0038449586765010174] (INCLUDES 0); z -1.506, p2 0.132
- mde_paired = 2.8016*SE = 0.023743256712335153; |delta| 0.01277 < MDE and CI straddles 0
- CARD VERDICT: WITHIN NOISE FLOOR — neither a promotable win nor a regression signal. Point estimate is slightly negative but not resolvable at the instrument's paired MDE. (unpaired watcher MDE floor 0.0453 for reference; the paired test is ~5x tighter here via rho 0.70.)

TINKER SPEND: actual metered ≤ $9.00 — the run cleared the $9 SpendGuard reservation (projection reserved before first billable call; no SpendExceeded) and for SFT athome guarantees projected==billed. Exact metered actual is NOT surfaced (observe_fit_score discards TrainReport.train_cost_usd / SpendGuard.spent and rmtree's the run journal). Padded ceiling (638*16*4096 @ $0.4/Mtok train) = $16.72 is loose; real sequence lengths put actual well under the $9 cap it cleared.

LABEL-ONLY VARIANT (step 3, STAGED NOT RUN): out/label_only_invocation.sh — literal bin/train.py --weight-mode ignore, same dataset, --out .../train-labelonly, $9 cap. NOTE for a paired comparison of that arm: re-run via the same capture wrapper with weight-mode ignore + write_probs version 'e28-ignore' (bin/train.py alone won't persist its probs).

ARTIFACTS (out/): probs/e28-example-weight.json (per-row P(NO_STEER)), delong_report.json, preflight_report.json, capture_meta.json, train/{train_report,score_report,.athome-metric}.json, run_train_capture.py, delong.py, preflight.py, label_only_invocation.sh, train.log. A verify lane re-derives DeLong from the two probs JSONs.
